This is two separate problems combined. Solve each independently, then combine with UNION ALL.
For part 1: GROUP BY user, COUNT ratings, ORDER BY count DESC then name ASC, LIMIT 1.
For part 2: Filter to February 2020, GROUP BY movie, ORDER BY AVG(rating) DESC then title ASC, LIMIT 1.
Use UNION ALL to combine the two result rows into a single result set.
